learning.evaluation_split_origin: CodeRAG-Bench Stack Overflow posts retrieval source sampled into NanoCodeRAG
learning.leakage_note: exclude NanoCodeRAG Stack Overflow queries, qrels, and positive posts; do not train on unfiltered code-rag-bench/stackoverflow-posts rows
useful_training_data: non-overlapping Stack Overflow question-to-answer thread retrieval
issue-to-fix and API usage Q&A pairs
documentation-linked Q&A with tag-matched hard negatives

synthetic_data.document_generation: realistic Stack Overflow-style threads with question, accepted answer, alternative answers, code snippets, caveats, and environment details
synthetic_data.question_generation: developer questions preserving language, framework, error message, and desired operation
synthetic_data.answerability: the selected post should contain a usable answer, workaround, warning, or API usage pattern

leakage_risk.risk: CodeRAG-Bench Stack Overflow source datastore can contain NanoCodeRAG evaluation positives
leakage_risk.recommended_filter: remove matching titles, bodies, answers, post ids, URLs, code blocks, and token fingerprints

references.title: CodeRAG-Bench: Can Retrieval Augment Code Generation?
